quickStart.title: Quick Start Guide
quickStart.description: The Quick Start guide helps you learn about the app's features. You can reopen it anytime if you previously dismissed it.

balanceStats.title: Balance & Statistics
balanceStats.description: Control how your financial data is calculated and displayed across the app.

creditLimit.label: Include credit limits in balance
creditLimit.description: When enabled, credit limits are subtracted from account balances in statistics and the balance trend chart. This shows your actual financial position instead of available credit.
